known_open_gates: The reissued readiness report remains NOT_READY with five blocking requirements.
The complete framework gate now passes 111 of 111 invariants; this is technical evidence, not fusion authority.
A fail-closed Phase-2 configuration transition exists, but no addon fusion lifecycle, addon ten-minute scheduler, or Hermes-native provider route exists.
No complete heartbeat budget, retry/backoff, or outage policy exists.
Neither role has issued an explicit APPROVED fusion decision.

operator.authority_basis: Explicit instructions authorized roadmap continuation through Step 10; no instruction authorized MIND fusion.
excluded_scope: fact, Primer, Special Instruction, Genome, immune, identity, or policy writes from model-facing tools
operator.reason: B-02 engineering is complete, but five Phase-2 readiness blockers remain and no explicit operator fusion approval exists.

guardian.decision_basis: Body-before-MIND, host-preservation, containment, authorship, technical readiness, and independent explicit-authority invariants.
approved_scope: continued separately scoped Phase-2 engineering without fusion
required_before_reconsideration: Resolve B-03 through B-07 in MIND_READINESS.json.
Preserve the complete 111/111 framework and 14/14 addon Stage-1 receipts.
Implement and verify Hermes-native transport, addon ten-minute heartbeat, budget/outage policy, and reversible fusion lifecycle.
Reissue the MIND-readiness report with a READY verdict.
Obtain a new target-bound APPROVED fusion decision from the operator.
Issue a separate target-bound APPROVED fusion decision from the guardian.
guardian.reason: Framework and governance alignment passed, but readiness is NOT_READY and explicit dual authorization is absent.

effective_decision.next_permitted_action: Separately scope B-03 reversible runtime lifecycle engineering; do not fuse MIND or activate reproduction.
effective_decision.fusion_rule: Fusion requires completed readiness evidence plus separate explicit target-bound fusion_decision=APPROVED decisions from both operator and guardian. Silence, continuation, runtime approval, technical certification, or a readiness PASS cannot substitute for either approval.
